after.fallback: Send urgent SMS to the Batphone and owner Mike if voicemail is reached

after.action: Clara takes a message and has office manager Jenny call the customer back first thing in the morning

changes.before: Uses ServiceTitan for CRM and dispatch.
changes.after: Integrate directly with Housecall Pro for booking routine services and creating customer profiles

changes.before: Calls unanswered after three rings will be forwarded to Clara as a safety net for after‑hours or unanswered calls.
changes.after: After-hours calls trigger emergency routing; if non-emergency, Clara takes a message and office manager Jenny will call back in the morning. After-hours emergency fee is $350.

changes.before: During business hours the main line rings to Sarah's phone first; if not answered it rolls to David's cell phone.
changes.after: During office hours, Clara handles calls, transfers to Jenny if the customer demands to speak to a human, otherwise processes routine plumbing requests.

changes.before: Owner David and his part‑time office help from wife Sarah. The company operates 4 trucks with 3 full‑time technicians besides David. They have a list of past customers for outbound reactivation. Email: david@milehighhvac.com.
changes.after: Standard dispatch fee is $69 (waived if customer approves work). After-hours emergency fee is $350. Annual tank flush costs $149.
